Id1.text: The AIDAstella is 253.26m long and was launched March 16th 2013.

Id2.text: The AIDAstella was christened on the 16th of March, 2013 and is 253260.0 millimetres long.

Id3.text: AIDAstella is 253260.0 millimetres in length and was christened on 2013-03-16.
